fields.label: Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblProductSales ps LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = ps.lClientKey ORDER BY ps.dtOrderDate DESC

fields.label: Product / Item Description
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sItemDescription FROM tblProductSaleInvoiceDetail ORDER BY lProductSalesKey DESC
fields.notes: Line items in tblProductSaleInvoiceDetail, not the header tblProductSales

fields.label: Quantity
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 lQty FROM tblProductSaleInvoiceDetail ORDER BY lProductSalesKey DESC

fields.label: Unit Price
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 lInventoryPricingListKey FROM tblProductSales ORDER BY 1

fields.label: Order Total
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(nTotalAmount, 0) AS Total FROM tblProductSales ORDER BY dtOrderDate DESC

fields.label: Order Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtOrderDate, 101) AS OrderDate FROM tblProductSales ORDER BY dtOrderDate DESC
